entry.title: What's New with SAP Datasphere in Q1, 2025
entry.content:
💫Join the SAP Datasphere product management team for the session and get the latest information about features and functions delivered in Q1 2025. You can ask the product experts in the Q&A section live during the session and will get an overview on the upcoming features planned for 2025.

The session will cover the following topics:
👉  General Product Updates
👉  Updates in Data Integration
👉  Updates in Data Modeling
👉  Updates on various other topics
👉  Outlook

We look forward to seeing you!!

Register for the series: https://events.sap.com/2024-1231-sap-btp-whatsnew-datashere-webinar-global/en/home

entry.title: Calling an OData V4 custom action from within an iFlow.
entry.content:
Hi,

I've built a custom action in backend S4 using RAP. Its purpose is to sync a Z-table in S4 with data read from an on-prem SQL Server. It works perfectly from Postman when I call it via a POST to https://xxxHostnamexxxx:44300/sap/opu/odata4/sap/zui_i_cv_person_api_o4/srvd_a2x/sap/zui_i_cv_person/0001/people/SAP__self.upsert_many .

I've tried incorporating it into an iFlow using the OData adaptor. This works fine for standard operations, like say using GET to return the top 10 records for the people entity. This is with Address: http://xxxCloudConnectorVirtualhostxxxx:44300/sap/opu/odata4/sap/zui_i_cv_person_api_o4/srvd_a2x/sap/zui_i_cv_person/0001 and Resource Path: people.

From my Postman trial I know the URL to the custom action ends in people/SAP__self.upsert_many. I tried using this as the Resource Path, but I get the error "com.sap.it.rt.adapter.http.api.exception. HttpResponseException: An internal server error occured: Resource path not found people/SAP__self.upsert_many". Is it possible to invoke a custom action using the OData adaptor?

I then tried using the HTTP adaptor to do a POST to the explicit URL, but I have to manage the CSRF protection manually and I can't work out how to pass the CSRF token to the POST operation after having called a GET to obtain the token. In this case I get this error {"error":{"code":"/IWBEP/CM_V4H_RUN/043","message":"CSRF token is missing","@SAP__common.ExceptionCategory":"CSRF_Token_Missing"}}

This is my first time using ABAP RAP and first time with SAP BTP. Maybe passing data en masse via a custom action isn't the right approach. Any help would be appreciated. 

- Anthony.

entry.title: Re: Not able to select the Path or choose file Using Abap...
entry.content:
This is the behavior of Web GUI aka SAP GUI for HTML.

Please refer to sap note 2249454 - ITS Up/Down: Using the WEBGUI File Browser

entry.title: Re: 1H 2025 Release - New export button on scheduled job manager
entry.content: Hello, please refer to https://help.sap.com/docs/successfactors-platform/managing-scheduled-jobs/exporting-job-data-in-scheduled-job-manager . And you can use job name, job type or data range to filter jobs and then click Export button, then it will only export the specific job details.

entry.title: Re: Payment Terms not to Change in Contract and sales order
entry.content:
Dear @Hitesh1214,

The payment terms will be copied automatically from the Customer master as required in your current sccenario.

Use BAdI or User exit to make the field non editable or greyed out in the sale order or in the required transaction using the ABAPer help.

Hope this helps!!!

Best Regards,
Surya.

entry.title: Re: PCR to read BSGRD value in IT0008 for payroll
entry.content:
you PCR should be as per below

TABLEP0008
RTE%     EMPCT
ADDWT *
 

Give 1000 in the wage type 1801 50% in capacity utilization your output should be 500 , Check the PCR grouping of the wage types thoroughly you will get the desired output

entry.title: Re: Documents not getting Downloaded - All Modules
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

Thank you for reaching out. This is Hannah from SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Team. As the issue happens in production environment as well and seems to be urgent, please consider raising an incident to the LOD-SF-EC team via SAP For Me. Our Employee Central colleagues will be able to assist you and provide possible workarounds.

Best regards,

Hannah

entry.title: Re: Fiori Elements: @common.QuickInfo
entry.content: Hi Rounak, Is there any solution for cap App on odata v4 ?? Appreciate your help

entry.title: Off Rental Period for ReFX Contracts
entry.content:
Dear All,

I have a scenario wherein off rental period is to be managed in ReFX contract. 

Contract period is for 5 years with multiple objects assigned. However, during the contract period, it is agreed with customer to stop the rental for one object for the period of 3 months. Post which normal rental should start. I tried managing the same with condition end dates, however the linearization still shows the annual revenue spread over off rental period of 3 months. 

Kindly let me know if there is any alternative solution to manage this requirement.

Regards,

Ajay

entry.title: Re: IBP RTI - Cloud Connector high availability setup
entry.content:
Great documentation! @Laxman_Singh . How can i apply this to a BIG-IP F5 load balancer? Are the cloud connector systems running on windows and the python code deployed as windows service here?

Also, do we need to import the SSL cert(load balancer IP/FQDN) in to Cloud connector under UI or System certificate?

Cloud Connector

entry.title: Re: SAC Story Time dimension issue (Previous year data di...
entry.content:
1. Define a page filter(input control) or a story filter with range on time dimension 
  2. Create a current date input control with month granularity
  3. Define a range with lookback with 30 years

User select the month from current date input control, report shows all the period back 30 years.

entry.title: Re: RSP create duplicate instance backups
entry.content:
Hi all, it is still happening... 3 instance backups were created:

Could it be the RSP setup itself, although it has been running for many years. Is it an issue on patch 19?

entry.title: Re: SAC Modeler - load data into a model - defines blank...
entry.content:
It's a current limitation. One workaround: split data load into two jobs: 

  1. Job 1 with data having parent member value for that hierarchy, map the column to hierarchy property 
  2. Job 2 with data having parent member empty, DON"T map hierarchy property in this case.

entry.title: Re: Payslip history not displaying
entry.content:
Hi, 

There are steps to solve this error in KBA 3193597 It contain several possible solution steps that may vary depending the error text. 

For those errors mainly check ODATA, user on Su53 and SU01 as well as BADI with periods is correctly implemented. as per note 3039488

Hope this helps.
Regards,

entry.title: Re: Upload Tax Rates -SAP S4 Public Cloud
entry.content:
Dear Lakshmi,

 

If this is referring to the United States, kindly refer to the SAP Help Portal How to Fill Out the Upload Template for Upload Tax Rates 

 

 

Best Regards,

Priyanka

entry.title: Stable Patch level confirmation for sap business one version 10 for HANA
entry.content:
Dear Sap Community, 

We are currently facing an issue with the dashboard displaying a white screen after upgrading to SAP Business One SP 2411, as recommended by SAP. The dashboard gets stuck and fails to load during login to SAP.

Could you please help confirm the latest stable version of SAP Business One so we can proceed accordingly for our clients?

Thank you for your support.

entry.title: Re: Persistence of CDS Views in HANA Database Local Table
entry.content: @Masaaki appreciating response, but looking for DB specific plausibility

entry.title: Re: Setup of FP2502 fails on new Windows Server
entry.content: What information do you get when you click the details links?

entry.title: Re: Using Remote Data Source in ICMR
entry.content:
Hi Vincezk

We do not have access to Hana db of the client. How do we proceed in this case? can you please help with details?

entry.title: Re: How to config SAP ECC to SF EC Mashup for Payroll inf...
entry.content:
Hi, 

From the standard documentation there is a KBA with some tips, this is https://me.sap.com/notes/2035081 - How to add a custom infotype to ESS 'Personal Profile' in WD ABAP. 

Also this might be helpful information about adding fields: 
https://community.sap.com/t5/human-capital-management-blogs-by-sap/enhance-mash-up-screen-for-custom-fields/ba-p/13555918
https://me.sap.com/notes/0002448908 

It is needed to consider that mashups uses new infotype framework which can be tested at puit_ui, you can use as reference to be sure the new IT framework is capable of using that custom IT. 

If mashup is used for viewing only then it can replicate this data but if it is used for maintenance of the data this data should not be replicated. Other case the IT will be mantained in 2 different ways and data from the mashup will be overwritten by replication. It needs to be chosen which maintenance method you prefer if mashup or replication. 

Hope this helps, 
Regards,

entry.title: How to Build AI chatbot using SAPUI5 , CAP service and AI Core API?
entry.content:
Dear all,
I implemented this AI chatbot functionality in SAPUI5 apps with SAP CAP backend and AI core API.
I thought of sharing my knowledge with you all. I took references from multiple blogs to complete this functionality, I will list all those blogs in the references section below and thank you for all the authors of those blogs.
Steps involved to implement this functionality,

  1. Create a destination in SAP BTP pointing your AI API.
  2. Configure this destination in SAP CAP backend service and UI level.
  3. Define action in the CAP service and call the destination to read data from SAP AI API.
  4. Use this action from CAP service in UI5 app and integrate CAP service API and UI5 app.

 

  1. Create a destination in SAP BTP pointing your AI API:

Name: URL: <AI_API_URL>/v2 # Eg. https://api.ai....ml.hana.ondemand.com/v2 <- Note the suffix /v2 is very important here

Authentication: OAuth2ClientCredentials

Client ID: <CLIENT_ID> -> you can get it from SAP AI core instance service key

Client Secret: <CLIENT_SECRET>  ->  you can get it from AI core instance service key

Token Service Url: <TOKEN_URL>/oauth/token   -> append this to Token URL

## Additional Properties

HTML5.DynamicDestination: true

URL.headers.AI-Resource-Group: default -> Just add key and value in properties even you do not have drop down values.

URL.headers.Content-Type: application/json -> Just add key and value in properties even you do not have drop down values. 

 

 

 

2. Configure this destination in SAP CAP backend service and UI level:

            Backend Cap service -> package.json

 "cds": {

    "requires": {

      "AI_ASSISTANT": {

        "kind": "rest",

        "[hybrid]": {

          "credentials": {

            "destination": "AI_ASSISTANT", -> Destination name here

            "path": "/inference/deployments/<deployment ID here>"

          }

        },

        "[production]": {

          "credentials": {

            "destination": "AI_ASSISTANT",

            "path": "/inference/deployments/<deployment ID here>"

          }

        }

      }

    },

  }

Note: You can get Deployment Id from AI launchpad.

UI5 app level- > xs-app.json

Add a new route,

{
      "source": "^/api/(.*)$",
      "target": "/inference/deployments/<deployment ID here>/$1",
      "authenticationType": "xsuaa",
      "destination": "AI_ASSISTANT"
    }

 3. Define action in the CAP service and call the destination to read data from SAP AI API:

   We will define action in CAP backend service to call the AI API through destination.

   db/schema.cds:

type AIChatBotResponse {
        text : String;
    }

       srv/service.cds:

service DemoService {
 action getAIResponse(query : String) returns AIChatBotResponse;
}

srv/service.js file: 

 this.on("getAIResponse", async (request: Request) => {
            const { query } = request.data;
            const aiDestination = await cds.connect.to("AI_ASSISTANT");
            const aiChatBotResponse = await aiDestination.send('POST','/v2/predict', { query: query })
            //return aiChatBotResponse;
            return { text: aiChatBotResponse.response };

        })

 Note: import above defined type from schema.cds into service definition cds file.

4. Use this action from CAP service in UI5 app and integrate CAP service API and UI5 app:

For UI part you can take dialog and display chat dialog on click of a AI chat bot button.

XML View/fragment code:

<core:FragmentDefinition
    xmlns="sap.m"
    xmlns:core="sap.ui.core"
    xmlns:f="sap.f"
    xmlns:form="sap.ui.layout.form"
    xmlns:u="sap.ui.unified"
    xmlns:layout="sap.ui.layout"
>
  <Dialog
        showHeader="false"
        verticalScrolling="false"
        contentHeight="60%"
        contentWidth="40%"
        draggable="true"
        resizable="true"
    >
<Page >
    <VBox width="100%" height="auto">
        <IllustratedMessage id="id_illuMsg" 
                                title="{i18n>aiChatBotTitle}" 
                                class="sapUiLargeMarginTop"
                                description="{i18n>aiChatbotAskMe}" 
                                illustrationType="tnt-FaceID"
                                illustrationSize="Auto">
            <additionalContent>
                <Button text="{i18n>aiChatbotBtnText}" press="onPressHide"/>
            </additionalContent>
            </IllustratedMessage>
           


        <ScrollContainer id="id_SC" visible="false" 
                        width="100%"
                        height="auto" 
                        vertical="true">
        <List id="id_List" items="{path:'chatbot>/list'}"
                            noDataText="{i18n>aiChatBotNoChat}">    
            <items>
            <FeedListItem text="{chatbot>text}" 
                    icon="{= ${chatbot>type} === 'query' ?                                        
                    'sap-icon://customer' : 'sap-icon://da-2' }">
            </FeedListItem>                        
            </items>
        </List>
        </ScrollContainer>
        <VBox id="id_box" visible="false" width="100%">
        <Input width="100%" 
                placeholder="{i18n>AiChatbotInputPlaceholder}"
                submit="onSubmitQuery"/>
        </VBox>
    </VBox>
</Page>
        <endButton>
            <Button
                text="{i18n>close}"
                type="Default"
                press="onAIChatbotClose"
            />
        </endButton>
   </Dialog>
</core:FragmentDefinition>

Component.js:
This is for adding Illustration types in chatbot dilaog. We should register them in the Illustration pool.
https://ui5.sap.com/#/api/sap.m.IllustratedMessage 

init: async function () {
                // call the base component's init function
                UIComponent.prototype.init.apply(this, arguments);

                // enable routing
                this.getRouter().initialize();

                // set the device model
                this.setModel(models.createDeviceModel(), "device");
              

                // code for AI chatBot to register illustartions/icons in the chat dialog
                var oTntSet = {
                    setFamily: "tnt",
                    setURI: sap.ui.require.toUrl("sap/tnt/themes/base/illustrations")
                };
    
                // register tnt illustration set
                IllustrationPool.registerIllustrationSet(oTntSet, false);
                
            },

 

 

UI code controller js/ts file:

onPressAIAssistant: function () {
            let oView = this.getView();
            if (!this._oAIDialog) {
                this._oAIDialog = Fragment.load({
                    id: oView.getId(),
                    name: "yournamesapce.fragment.AIChatbot",
                    controller: this
                }).then(function (oDialog) {
                    oView.addDependent(oDialog);
                    return oDialog;
                }.bind(this));
            }
            this._oAIDialog.then(function (oDialog) {
               
                oDialog.open();
            }.bind(this));
        },
        onPressHide: function(oEvent) {
            let oView = this.getView();
            let oBtn = oEvent.getSource();
            oView.byId("id_SC").setVisible(true);
            oView.byId("id_box").setVisible(true);
            oBtn.setVisible(false);
        },

 

onSubmitQuery: function (oEvent) {
            let oInput = oEvent.getSource();
            let sQuery = oInput.getValue();
            oInput.setValue("");
    
            // Add User query to the model
            this.aList =  this.ChatbotJSONModel.getProperty("/list");
            if (!this.aList) {
              this.aList = [];
            }
    
            let oJsonObj = {
              text: sQuery,
              type: "query",
            };
            this.aList.push(oJsonObj);
            this.ChatbotJSONModel.setProperty("/list", this.aList);
 
            this.aList = this.ChatbotJSONModel.getProperty("/list");

            let oPayLoad = {};
            oPayLoad.query = sQuery
            let oDataModel = this.getView()?.getModel();
             const that = this;
                return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
                    oDataModel.callFunction("/getAIResponse", {
                        method: "POST",
                        urlParameters: oPayLoad,
                        success: function (oDataReceived) {
                            if (oDataReceived) {
                                if (oDataReceived && oDataReceived.getAIResponse) {
                                    let aiResponse = oDataReceived.getAIResponse;
                                    let oJsonObj = {
                                        text: aiResponse.text,
                                        type: "response",
                                      };
                                    that.aList.push(oJsonObj);
                                    that.ChatbotJSONModel.setProperty("/list", that.aList);
                                    resolve(aiResponse);
                                    }
                            }
                        },
                        error: function (oErrorReceived) {
                           reject(oErrorReceived);
                        }
                    });
                });

          }

UI screenshot:

References:
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/a-chatgpt-like-chat-app-built-with-modern-sap-technologies-cap-sapui5-part/ba-p/13549057

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/integrating-ai-with-sapui5-fiori-apps-part-1-concept/ba-p/13734579

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/custom-chatbot-widget-in-sapui5-using-expression-binding/ba-p/13867135

https://github.com/SAP-samples/azure-openai-aicore-cap-api/blob/main/documentation/02-cap-api/01-prepare-cap-deployment.md

Best Regards,
Venkatesh.

entry.title: Re: exporting ALV to spreadsheet
entry.content: Bugs usually depend on reproduction steps and on data. Data are different between quality and production. So check the SAP notes etc.

entry.title: Re: Why my deploy "Deploy using cf deploy" is failed?
entry.content:
When the "bookstore-db" is in status failed it means it couldn't create the HDI container (schema) in your HANA database. So best would be to verify if your HANA Cloud is created, running, and mapped to the subaccount/space you are deploying your application in. (Step 1) You can also click on the "failed" message in the cockpit to learn more about the reason.

Once verified that HC is ready, you have to delete "bookstore-db" via the cockpit and retry the deployment.

entry.title: Re: Looking to Understand User Exits in SAP SD with Real-Time Case Studies
entry.content: This question has been asked and answered several times in the forum. Is there any specific reason to repeat the same answers?

entry.title: Re: importing users data
entry.content: Hi, actually there should be error messaging popping up when mandatory field is not filled, may I know what elements are you trying to import, for example job information?

entry.title: Standard Web Service for ATP Check and Release of Customer Demand in Outbound Logistics
entry.content:
In SAP Business ByDesign, is there any standard web service to check ATP of customer demand, and to release customer demand?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Standard Web Service for ATP Check and Release of Cus...
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

There is a standard web service CustomerRequirementATPCheck, that can be used to simulate ATP check. It returns the result of the ATP check, but it won't impact the ATP status of any customer demand.

There is no standard web service to release customer demand.

Henry

SAP Support

entry.title: Re: RE - How to send a SOAP message ( Consumer Proxy ) to multiple SAP systems from a SAP ERP syste
entry.content:
Hello,

I have the same problem, have you find a solution ?

Best regards,

Eric

entry.title: Re: SAP Intelligent RPA 2.0 - Explore Outlook features

entry.title: Re: SF Display Name Format including comma separator
entry.content: Hi, I have tested the same in my demo and the result is the same, space is removed upon save. This is the current system design. Best regards, Elsa

entry.title: Re: SAP Public Cloud Intrastat Conversion of Regions
entry.content: This is regarding the Intrastat report, which in HANA was put into the Governance, Risk, and Compliance area. Before that it used to be part of SD and MM.

Prakhar

entry.title: Re: Query regarding changing the default delimiter from c...
entry.content:
I'm afraid it's not possible right now. Please create an item in influence portal: 

https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/campaign/884

entry.title: Re: SAP Utilities Roadmap 2025 Onwards
entry.content:
Hello @Amit200385,

I don´t expect any updates regarding the templates in future releases, because the MDT templates are already available for years. The effort for setting up these templates lies especially in determining the attribute values. For your case the question is if these ones are given by the calling application or if these ones have to be determined in SAP. I would expect that the calling application calls the Odata with the expected values. 
Of course objects can also be created without MDT templates, but then you will need to do several calls and so a sequence needs to be set up. Personally I find MDT templates a good way to create objects, but sometimes other ways are better. It depends on your use case. Also open for a chat about your use case.

Regards,

Pieter

entry.title: Re: oninit rule not triggered after employee import
entry.content: Hi, you can try onsave rule instead

entry.title: Re: How can I link to a Success Factors function that app...
entry.content: Dear Customer, Thank you for reaching out. This is Hannah from SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Team. Please refer to the handbook: Using Deep Links >> List of SAP SuccessFactors Deep Links to see which links are available. (https://help.sap.com/docs/successfactors-platform/using-deep-links/list-of-sap-successfactors-deep-links?q=workflow) Unfortunately, there are no deep links or URLs available for "Delegate My Workflows." You may also find the KBA for your reference: 2493928 - SAP SuccessFactors Deep Link Guide - User Assistance Documentation Link. (https://me.sap.com/notes/2493928/E) Thank you. Hannah

entry.title: Re: Setup of FP2502 fails on new Windows Server

entry.title: Re: Setup of FP2502 fails on new Windows Server
entry.content: It only shows the LOG-File, which i have enclosed to my post. This Morning I found SAP-Note 3563115 - but there is no solution yet

entry.title: Re: Modify form pick pack and production manager
entry.content:
Hi,

any UDF added to Marketing document lines will show up on this screen. Then it is simply a matter of knowing what information needs to be shown here, if it is something from the document I would suggest using the simpler method of assigning FMS to that field on the document itself. This would mean you don't need to create a bespoke Add-on for handling one field.

BR,

Matija

entry.title: Re: SAP PS
entry.content:
Hi Ali,

In SAP PS, when you do the TECO, it signals that the work is finished, however the system still allow certain changes i.e. confirmations, dates, do services entry sheets even after TECO. But, you can't  do major planning activities, like creating new network/activity. To prevent the changes after WBS TECO, you can specify user status, linked with WBS TECO status in control you forbidden changes like CN22, CJ20N editing. 

I hope this help with your query. Let me know if you need any further assistance.

entry.title: AI Agent
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

I would like to inquire regarding the availability and usage of AI Agents within SAP environments.

  1. Are AI Agents available for both SAP Public Cloud and SAP Private Cloud editions?

  2. Could you kindly provide guidance on the prerequisites, activation process, and how to utilize AI Agents in both cloud models?

I appreciate your support and look forward to your insights.

Best Regards,

Darma

entry.title: BYD2502 Cannot change implementation because of status Tested
entry.content:
Implementation project is in status Tested so that it is impossible to continue with changes. How can we set another status?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: BYD2502 Cannot change implementation because of statu...
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

 

To revert the Project status from Tested to Started, please follow the below steps:

  1. Go to Business Configuration work center.
  2. Select Implementation Projects view.
  3. Highlight Implementation Project and select Open Activity List button.
  4. Go to Test phase.
  5. Highlight Confirm Milestone: Go-Live Readiness Acceptance activity and select Open button.
  6. Uncheck Go-Live Readiness Accepted check box.
  7. Select Confirm button.

 

Best Regards,

SAP Technical Support,

Cariford

entry.title: Re: RAP : Trying to make a child with composition relatio...
entry.content: Sure..

entry.title: Re: Guide to Agents and Connectors in RISE with SAP
entry.content:
Hello @Athiwat 

I'm not sure if you can help me out with a new question... but maybe you can forward it internally?!

Yesterday I got informed by a Sales colleague that obviously SAP Datasphere should no longer be contained in the two packages (Premium, Premium plus) of RISE private cloud, even if it is still stated here, today.

Who is right?

Thanks, Martin

entry.title: Re: Change data in the dropdown list or searchHelp with draft in RAP in Odata v4gets the old text a
entry.content: Looks like your POST call or the SAVE operation is not working as expected. Can you please share more details?

entry.title: Custom Personas vs. Multiple Custom Instances in SSAM
entry.content:
Hi all,

We currently have a requirement to have multiple SAP Service Asset Manager (SSAM) mobile applications . However, we are facing challenges in managing a common configuration across all instances.

To address this, I am exploring alternative approaches that would allow us to implement independent configurations for each application. So far, we have identified two possible options:
1. Custom Personas
2. Multiple Custom Instances

While researching, I came across a blog post where SAP clearly states that using multiple custom instances is  recommended approach for productive systems.

Given this, I’d like to ask if anyone has experience working with custom personas or custom instances in a similar context. Your insights into any challenges or limitations you’ve faced would be extremely valuable in helping us determine the most stable and scalable solution.

Additionally, if there are any blogs, documentation, or best practices available around creating and managing custom personas, please feel free to share those as well.

Looking forward to your thoughts and suggestions.

entry.title: Re: PCR to read BSGRD value in IT0008 for payroll
entry.content:
Hi Sikindar, 

Thank you. I made the PCR as below and removed "GEN" from Schema and it worked.

entry.title: Re: Multiple MBGMCR IDocs are triggering for single material document having multiple line items
entry.content:
Hi Nikhil,

Sorry for delayed response. The issue in my case got fixed by adding item number (zeile) in where condition while select query from MSEG in the IDOC. That fixed my issue. Not sure what is your case if this helps.

Thanks,

Best Regards,

Raina

entry.title: Re: SAP CC allowance counters
entry.content: Thanks Eric. Will refer the SAP note and keep the recommended values in mind.

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Stock Room Management - Fiori Application...
entry.content: You can't move from LE-WM to Stock Room Management. Stock Room Management is LE-WM.

entry.title: Re: Can't set series when creating a Project Management o...
entry.content:
Hello,

 

My Series are there since I'm also able to set them from SAP when creating a new project.

But when doing it from ServiceLayer it will ignore the series I input and set the default one which is "Primario".

Kind regards

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Stock Room Management - Fiori Application...
entry.content:
Hello @pat_pillay 

Stock Room Management is nothing more or new than LE-WM. It is just a name or license item. There were no Fiori apps for LE-WM, thus there are not Fiori apps for Stock Room Management. 

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: How to change GL account after Supplier invoice is posted
entry.content:
Hello all,

Is it possible to change the GL assignment after a Supplier invoice has been posted?

Background

We have set up a list of Product Category IDs which will map to the respective GL when a user does a Goods receipt after receiving an invoice. This is to facilitate general users who are unfamiliar with accounting GL accounts.

Scenario

A user had selected the wrong Product Category but the supplier invoice was approved and posted.

I would like to know if it is still possible to change the GL assignment without cancelling the invoice.

Any help is appreciated.

Thanks!

Nicole

entry.title: Re: Is SAP Stock Room Management compatible with Handling...
entry.content: As Stock Room Management is just a fancy name for LE-WM, I would not expect any Fiori apps here.

entry.title: Re: Understanding SAP’s Product Strategy for Governance, Risk, and Compliance (GRC) Solutions
entry.content:
Hello @samirchougrad, 

We are keeping the very same commercial model as in place today for the individual solutions.

We are not introducing any new materials or metrics. 

Kind regards, 

Thomas

entry.title: SAP Signavio April 2025 Product Release - Tech Partnerships
entry.content:
In today's fast-evolving business landscape, partnerships are key to delivering faster, smarter, and value-driven transformations for our customers. With the SAP Signavio April 2025 Product Release, we are excited to share a few new technology partnerships that further expand the value of our offering. By partnering with Konekti, Medallia, and Mimica, we are strengthening our ecosystem further to drive even greater process insights, operational efficiency, and customer-centric innovation.

At SAP Signavio, we believe we are better together — combining strengths across a trusted ecosystem to help organizations break down silos, maximize the value of their data, and unlock transformational outcomes at scale.

 

Konekti

Trusted by top practitioners, Konekti is redefining process intelligence by tackling the biggest bottleneck—data transformation. Built by experts from the birthplace of process mining, the Konekti platform accelerates insights, reduces costs, and integrates seamlessly with existing tech stacks.

SAP Signavio's partnership with Konekti enhances our portfolio by accelerating object-based data modeling , while reducing process mining migration efforts and offering transformative efficiency in large-scale projects. It empowers your process intelligence initiatives with high-quality and trusted data models, integrated with SAP Signavio. Generate actionable insights faster, increase the ROI of process intelligence, and deliver trusted insights.

For more information see here.

 

Medallia

Medallia is a market leader in customer, employee, citizen, and patient experience. As one of the top enterprise experience platforms, Medallia Experience Cloud is the experience system of record that makes all other applications customer and employee aware.

Medallia complements our SAP Signavio portfolio by enriching process data with customer insights. It collect structured and unstructured customer and employee signals at scale, complement it with operational and observational data, analyze it, and distribute actionable insights to every level of the organization in real-time to streamline SAP Signavio processes for your clients and break down organizational silos.

For more information see here.

 

Mimica

Mimica is an AI-powered task mining company that automates repetitive desktop tasks and enhance productivity. By delivering rapid, data-driven recommendations, Mimica helps organizations reclaim time, reduce costs, and transform operations at scale. The company has saved clients over 1 million hours of productivity and is trusted by some of the world’s largest enterprises.

Mimica aligns with our open ecosystem strategy and extends the options to gather and analyze task-level data to complement our process mining capabilities. With AI-powered task mining observes employee actions across the desktop and categorizes them into detailed process maps. This process intelligence highlights inefficiencies, prioritizes improvements by ROI, and provides blueprints for automation, including GenAI, RPA, and IDP. With this, teams can maximize workforce productivity, cut costs, and drive operational excellence across your ECC or S4HANA ecosystems.

For more information see here.

entry.title: SAP Signavio April 2025 Product Release - Process Governance and Collaboration
entry.content:
SAP Signavio April 2024 Release

Process Governance and Collaboration


SAP Signavio Process Governance

Within SAP Signavio Process Governance, we are releasing the following highlight:

Maintain Compliance with Configurable Case Retention

With the new configurable case retention feature, administrators can now easily define who can manage retention settings and automate the deletion of closed cases after a defined period. This feature enables organizations to ensure compliance by automatically removing outdated cases in line with regulatory policies, simplify governance through clearly assigned permissions, and optimize system performance by reducing data clutter. It also strengthens data governance by enforcing strict approval processes, ensuring that only authorized users can modify or export retention-related information. 

 

SAP Signavio Process Collaboration Hub

SAP Signavio Process Collaboration Hub continues to evolve as a central space where teams align, share, and drive transformation. We're pleased to introduce a set of new enhancements, some of which span across the broader SAP Signavio Process Transformation Suite, designed to simplify daily work, improve access to information, and strengthen collaboration across your organization.

 

New unified Dictionary UI in Collaboration Hub to enable consumption of Dictionary content

For those navigating the complexities of process modeling, the exciting new update to SAP Signavio Collaboration Hub is designed with you in mind. The newly unified dictionary user interface promises to enhance your experience by making the exploration of dictionary content easier and more intuitive than ever. With a comprehensive table view and detailed pages for dictionary entries, finding and utilizing crucial information becomes a breeze. This improved accessibility benefits both process experts and casual hub users alike, ensuring that everyone can quickly and easily access the content they need. Embrace this user-friendly update to streamline your workflows and empower your decision-making with readily available insights.

Click here to start the step-by-step tutorial for this feature

 

Re-generate reports with advanced filtering

Managing reports is now more efficient with updates that let you quickly access and reuse up to 50 of your most recently generated reports. Instead of starting from scratch, users can regenerate reports using saved filters, rename them for better organization, or download them for immediate use.

Advanced filtering capabilities also make it easier to find the exact content you need during report creation, helping reduce time spent searching and improving accuracy.

These improvements are especially valuable for process modelers and administrators who need to generate regular reports with minimal manual effort, while maintaining consistency across teams and use cases.

Click here to start the step-by-step tutorial for this feature

 

Folder hierarchy view for access rights

Managing user and group access across your workspace is now simpler and more transparent with the new “folder hierarchy” view in SAP Signavio Collaboration Hub. This feature provides a full view of your folder structure and the associated permissions, helping administrators quickly identify who has access to what content for example "Shared Documents" in SAP Signavio Process Collaboration Hub and "Repository" of SAP Signavio Process Intelligence. With an intuitive interface for reviewing and adjusting access rights, administrators can resolve permission issues faster, maintain better control over sensitive content, and support compliance efforts more effectively. This update is a step toward a more unified and manageable permissions model across the entire SAP Signavio Process Transformation Suite, giving you the clarity and control needed to confidently govern your workspace. 

Click here to start the step-by-step tutorial for this feature

entry.title: Re: What's New in SAP SuccessFactors Onboarding: 1H 2025
entry.content: Can someone explain exactly what will be the new way to setup the PFS? what we will need to do in order to setup the document?

entry.title: How should pass Date field "YYYY-MM-DD into data action as parameter
entry.content: I want to pass the data format value in to Data action parameter but while passing data action as taking only DD not complete format

entry.title: how to make alv editable for any two fields& add save and delete buttons using factory method
entry.content:
REPORT zcls_factory1.

DATA: lt_data  TYPE STANDARD TABLE  OF zcds_ekko,
      lt_data1 TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF  zcds_vbap.


DATA:lo_alv  TYPE REF TO cl_salv_table.


SELECTION-SCREEN BEGIN OF BLOCK b1 WITH FRAME TITLE TEXT-001.
  PARAMETERS: p_r1 RADIOBUTTON GROUP rad1 DEFAULT 'X' USER-COMMAND rad,
              p_r2 RADIOBUTTON GROUP rad1.
SELECTION-SCREEN END OF BLOCK b1.

DATA: l_ebeln TYPE ebeln,
      l_vbeln TYPE vbeln_va.
SELECTION-SCREEN BEGIN OF BLOCK b2 WITH FRAME TITLE TEXT-002.
  SELECT-OPTIONS: s_ebeln FOR l_ebeln MODIF ID po,
                  s_vbeln FOR l_vbeln MODIF ID so.
SELECTION-SCREEN END OF BLOCK b2.

AT SELECTION-SCREEN OUTPUT.


  IF p_r1 = 'X'.
    LOOP AT SCREEN.
      IF screen-group1 = 'SO'.
        screen-active = 0.
        MODIFY SCREEN.
      ENDIF.
    ENDLOOP.
  ENDIF.

  IF p_r1 = ' '.
    LOOP AT SCREEN.
      IF screen-group1 = 'PO'.
        screen-active = 0.
        MODIFY SCREEN.
      ENDIF.
    ENDLOOP.
  ENDIF.
*
*class class1 DEFINITION.
*  PUBLIC SECTION.
*  methods handler  for EVENT ADDED_FUNCTION of  cl_salv_events_table.
*  ENDCLASS.
*
*  class class1 IMPLEMENTATION.
*    METHOD handler.
*      ENDMETHOD.
*    ENDCLASS.




START-OF-SELECTION..


  IF p_r1 = 'X'.
    SELECT * FROM zcds_ekko INTO TABLE @LT_data  WHERE ebeln IN @s_ebeln.
  ELSE.

    SELECT * FROM zcds_vbap INTO TABLE @LT_data1 WHERE salesorder IN @s_vbeln.
  ENDIF.

*          creating alv report

*  SET PF-STATUS 'DISPLAY'.



DATA:lo_event TYPE REF TO cl_salv_events_table.


*       grv_alv TYPE REF TO cl_salv_table.
*            DATA LIST_DISPLAY   TYPE SAP_BOOL.
*            DATA R_CONTAINER    TYPE REF TO CL_GUI_CONTAINER.
*            DATA CONTAINER_NAME TYPE STRING.
*            DATA R_SALV_TABLE   TYPE REF TO CL_SALV_TABLE.
*            DATA T_TABLE        TYPE TABLE.
  IF p_r1 = 'X'.
*    refresh lo_alv.
    cl_salv_table=>factory(
*              EXPORTING
*                list_display   = IF_SALV_C_BOOL_SAP=>FALSE
*                r_container    = r_container
*                container_name = container_name
      IMPORTING
        r_salv_table   = lo_alv
      CHANGING
        t_table        = lt_data
           ).
  ENDIF.

  IF  p_r2 = 'X'.

*    refresh lo_alv.
    cl_salv_table=>factory(
*           EXPORTING
          list_display   = IF_SALV_C_BOOL_SAP=>FALSE
*           r_container    = r_container
*                container_name = container_name
    IMPORTING
      r_salv_table   = lo_alv
    CHANGING
      t_table        = lt_data1
         ).
  ENDIF.

  lo_alv->set_screen_status(
                     report        = sy-repid
                    pfstatus      = 'DISPLAY'
*                 set_functions = C_FUNCTIONS_NONE
 ).

**DATA VALUE TYPE REF TO CL_SALV_EVENTS_TABLE.
*
  lo_event = lo_alv->get_event( ).




" Set the event handler for the top of page event
*SET HANDLER top_of_page_handler FOR lo_event->top_of_page.

*
*  data: lo_obj type REF TO class1.
*
*  CREATE OBJECT lo_obj.
*  set HANDLER lo_obj->handler for lo_event.






  CALL METHOD lo_alv->display( ).

entry.title: Re: Express document "Update was terminated" for BAPI BAPI_SALESORDER_CREATEFROMDAT2
entry.content:
Hello RaymondGiuseppi,

I am facing simmilar issue with BAPI_PO_CHNAGE could you please suggest any solution for below issue?

We are using 'BAPI_PO_CHANGE' to modify Delivery date, some times after 'BAPI_TRANSACTION_COMMIT' we are getting error “Express document "Update was terminated" received from author”. If we run same file second time it will get processed successfully.

 

 

Can anyone please let me know how to suppress this error.

 

CALL FUNCTION 'BAPI_PO_CHANGE'
    EXPORTING
      PURCHASEORDER                = T_EKET-EBELN
*     POHEADER                     = T_HEADER
*     POHEADERX                    = T_HEADERX
*     POADDRVENDOR                 =
*     TESTRUN                      =
*     MEMORY_UNCOMPLETE            =
*     MEMORY_COMPLETE              =
*     POEXPIMPHEADER               =
*     POEXPIMPHEADERX              =
*     VERSIONS                     =
*     NO_MESSAGING                 =
*     NO_MESSAGE_REQ               =
*     NO_AUTHORITY                 =
*     NO_PRICE_FROM_PO             =
*   IMPORTING
*     EXPHEADER                    =
*     EXPPOEXPIMPHEADER            =
   TABLES
     RETURN                       = RETURN
*     POITEM                       = T_POITEM
*     POITEMX                      = T_POITEMX
*     POADDRDELIVERY               = T_POADDRDELIVERY
     POSCHEDULE                   = T_POSCHEDULE
     POSCHEDULEX                  = T_POSCHEDULEX
*     POACCOUNT                    =
*     POACCOUNTPROFITSEGMENT       =
*     POACCOUNTX                   =
*     POCONDHEADER                 =
*     POCONDHEADERX                =
*     POCOND                       = T_POCOND
*     POCONDX                      =
*     POLIMITS                     =
*     POCONTRACTLIMITS             =
*     POSERVICES                   =
*     POSRVACCESSVALUES            =
*     POSERVICESTEXT               =
*     EXTENSIONIN                  =
*     EXTENSIONOUT                 = T_EXTENSIONOUT
*     POEXPIMPITEM                 =
*     POEXPIMPITEMX                =
*     POTEXTHEADER                 =
*     POTEXTITEM                   =
*     ALLVERSIONS                  =
*     POPARTNER                    = T_POPPARTNER
*     POCOMPONENTS                 =
*     POCOMPONENTSX                =
*     POSHIPPING                   =
*     POSHIPPINGX                  =
*     POSHIPPINGEXP                =
*     POHISTORY                    =
*     POHISTORY_TOTALS             =
*     POCONFIRMATION               =
            .
  READ TABLE RETURN  WITH KEY TYPE = 'E' .
  IF SY-SUBRC IS INITIAL.
    CALL FUNCTION 'BAPI_TRANSACTION_ROLLBACK'
*     IMPORTING
*       RETURN        =
              .
    DELETE RETURN WHERE TYPE NE 'E'.
    LOOP AT RETURN.
      IT_ERROR-MESS = RETURN-MESSAGE.
      IT_ERROR-PO = T_EKET-EBELN.
      APPEND IT_ERROR.
    ENDLOOP.
  ELSE.
    READ TABLE RETURN  WITH KEY TYPE = 'A' .
    IF SY-SUBRC IS INITIAL.
      CALL FUNCTION 'BAPI_TRANSACTION_ROLLBACK'.             .
      DELETE RETURN WHERE TYPE NE 'A'.                                             
      LOOP AT RETURN.
        IT_ERROR-MESS = RETURN-MESSAGE.
        IT_ERROR-PO = T_EKET-EBELN.
        APPEND IT_ERROR.
      ENDLOOP.
    ELSE.
      CALL FUNCTION 'BAPI_TRANSACTION_COMMIT'
      EXPORTING
        WAIT          = 'X'.
 
ENDIF.

entry.title: Re: How to Build AI chatbot using SAPUI5 , CAP service and AI Core API?
entry.content: @Venkatesh_Machineni Thanks for sharing your coding. I was wondering why you are not using the SAP Cloud SDK for AI to integrate CAP application with SAP Generative AI Hub.

entry.title: Re: What's New in SAP Reference Architecture? [Spring Edition]
entry.content: thanks for the insight. Looking forward to the release of reference technical architecture part. We at SAP have very good number of solutions which will definitely fall under this. Together with business capabilities  & technical capabilities, the final reference solution will be more powerful as it can help not only cover the WHAT (business capabilities) part, but also will highlight HOW (through technical capabilities) part.

entry.title: How to configure late Coming and Early Leaving in SuccessFactors TimeSheet/TimeTracking?
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am working on Timesheet/Time-Tracking.

I have below scenarios, could anyone help me with the configuration please. We are following Clock based work schedules. We also have Time Tracking in place.

Late Coming Scenario:

  1. The Grace period is 15 mins.
  2. If the employee is coming after 15 minutes and up to 2 hours this will be considered as late coming, We should have a time valuation to capture these late comings.
  3. If the employee is coming after 2 hours up to 4 hours, this will be considered as half day absence. We should have a time valuation to capture these half day absences.
  4. If the employee is coming after 4 hours, this will be considered as full day absence. We should have a time valuation to capture these half day absences.

Early Leaving Scenario:

  1. Grace period is 5 mins.
  2. If the employee is leaving before 5 minutes and up to 2 hours this will be considered as early leaving, We should have a time valuation to capture these early leavings.
  3. If the employee is leaving before 2 hours and up to 4 hours this will be considered as half day absence, We should have a time valuation to capture these half day absences.
  4. If the employee is leaving before 4 hours this will be considered as full day absence, We should have a time valuation to capture these full day absences.

Based on the above valuations HR will deduct the leave balance manually every month. Here the month is from 20th to 19th. (Ex April 20th to May 19th).

Please suggest me how to configure the above requirement.

Regards

Hafeez

entry.title: Re: SAC – Integrated Financial Planning – DRIVER6 & alloc...
entry.content:
Hi @Aleque,

would you mind sharing what finally solved your issue?

Thanks
Susanne

entry.title: JARs to develop groovy locally
entry.content:
Hi,

is there a way how to get the required jars in order to be able to develop/run and test groovy scripts locally using your IDE?

I see this Blog: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/exploring-cpi-s-filesystem-s-content/ba-p/13414683

from 2019 how to get the required jars from CI using iFlow... This way seems not to work anymore, but I really would expect that SAP somehow offer these jars to download...

Thanks for any help.

Milan

entry.title: Re: SAP Business Data Cloud - FAQs
entry.content:
@jeetendrakapase 

Hello, do you mean standalone SAP HANA Cloud Data Lake do not support delta-share

but the embedded HANA Cloud Data Lake in Datasphere Yes?

or only the foundation layer will support Delta Lake?

I mean, with File spaces in Datasphere, will we be able to activate delta share for custom tables based on files defined in Datasphere?
Thanks

entry.title: Re: SAP DataServices setup automation
entry.content:
Hi @asdfsadfasdf 

 

  1. Configure DSN with SSL - Command line: Data Services Connection Manager (Unix)
    • the command below should show you the needed parameters
      • $LINK_DIR/bin/DSConnectionManager.sh -help
  2. Test Connection with CMC console -- More context needed on this, do you mean testing the connection to CMC?, Testing Repository connection in CMC? - Not clear
    • Command Line Administration
  3. Set up AccessServer - Command line: Adding an Access Server (Unix or Linux)
  4. Setup JobServer - Command line: Adding a Job Server (Unix or Linux)
  5. Define RT services and instances from DS Management console --> Currently not possible
  6. Configure Web Services from DS Management Console 
    • Using SAP Data Services as a SOAP Web Service provider
    • Using SAP Data Services as a RESTful Web Service Provider

BR,

Joe

entry.title: Re: Trust Configuration" in SAP BTP Trial Account – Unabl...
entry.content:
Dear Isidro,

There is some changes in trial account , you can try using below steps hope it will solved your Issue.

Go to Global account -> tried booster -> Subscribe to 'Get Started with SAP Build Apps'
and it automatically creates 'Trust'. It enables both SAP Build Apps and SAP Build Work Zone Standard Edition

Regards,

Vikash Kumar

entry.title: April 2025 Product Release Process and Journey Modeling
entry.content:
SAP Signavio solutions are designed to help companies thrive. By providing a clear view of your processes, SAP Signavio enables you to observe how your company is running, derive actionable insights, and transform those insights into continuous improvement loops. 

In this April 2025 release, we have introduced several powerful updates designed to simplify decision modeling, improve process lifecycle management, streamline report generation, and enhance journey modeling. Whether you're looking to optimize decision models, maintain data consistency, or create impactful customer journeys, these enhancements empower you to achieve more with greater efficiency and precision. 

Let's dive into what's new in this latest SAP Signavio release. 

 

SAP Signavio Process Manager  

Enhanced DMN TestLab UX for streamlined decision modeling 

For decision modelers, managing complex decision models and test cases can be a challenging task. But what if there was a way to simplify the process, enhance usability, and accelerate your decision modeling workflow? Empower decision modelers with a streamlined and intuitive DMN TestLab UX, designed to simplify test case management and accelerate decision modeling. With improved efficiency and enhanced usability, the platform offers intuitive tools, filtering, and grouping to simplify navigation through complex decision models. Additionally, the system supports scalable management, making it easier to handle growing decision model requirements. 

 

 Click here to watch the Enable Now video. 

 

Extended lifecycle control of synchronized process models between SAP Signavio and SAP Cloud ALM based on approval status 

In today’s fast-paced business environment, maintaining data consistency and control over your processes is crucial. Organizations using the integration of SAP Signavio and SAP Cloud ALM can now: 

  • Enhance process control and data consistency with automated synchronization of approved process model revisions. 
  • Reduce manual effort for process managers by streamlining the process and implementation lifecycle with automatic updates based on approval status.  

Benefit from greater flexibility with configurable synchronization settings, ensuring only approved revisions are seamlessly transferred. 

This feature not only reduces the complexity of managing process models but also empowers teams to focus on more strategic initiatives, knowing their process data is always up to date and aligned. 

 

Report history and advanced filtering for quick report generation 

Reporting is a crucial part of process management, but it’s often time-consuming and manual. That’s why we’re excited to introduce an enhancement to SAP Signavio Process Manager that makes report retrieval faster, easier, and more efficient than ever before. Now, process experts can quickly access up to 50 of their most recently generated reports—without having to rebuild them from scratch. This feature streamlines the reporting experience, significantly reducing the manual effort involved and enabling a more productive workflow. 

  

 

Supporting collapsed subprocesses and intermediate link events when synchronizing process models to SAP Solution Manager 

In the current dynamic corporate landscape, clarity and efficiency in process management are more important than ever. That's why synchronizing your tools can make a huge difference—especially when it comes to connecting SAP Signavio Process Manager with SAP Solution Manager. Enhance process transparency and navigation by synchronizing collapsed subprocesses and intermediate link events from SAP Signavio Process Manager to SAP Solution Manager as process links. Gain a comprehensive view of related processes with seamless synchronization of linked diagrams, ensuring better understanding of process relationships. Plus, improve usability with direct navigation between interconnected processes, enabling a more efficient and intuitive workflow. 

 

 Click here to watch the Enable Now video. 

 

Supporting mapping of activities from dictionary subcategories when synchronizing to SAP Solution Manager 

As organizations continue to refine their process landscapes, the ability to customize and fine-tune synchronization becomes increasingly valuable. With enhanced capabilities for mapping dictionary activities, users can now take greater control over their synchronization projects—driving both flexibility and consistency. Improve synchronization accuracy by incorporating activities from subcategories or main categories, ensuring a more comprehensive mapping process. Deliver a more intuitive user experience with a connector that reflects diverse dictionary structures. Additionally, simplify migration from the classic connector by replicating familiar functionality for a seamless transition. 

Click here to watch the Enable Now video. 

 

Identification of synchronized processes as template-based, variant, or standalone when synchronizing with SAP Solution 

Effective process management starts with clarity—and in complex enterprise landscapes, that means knowing exactly what type of process you're working with. Enhance process management in SAP Solution Manager by clearly marking synchronized process types—variant, template, or standalone—ensuring users can accurately identify and categorize processes. This clarity enables more efficient system configuration, testing, and documentation, allowing users to tailor and customize processes with confidence. By streamlining process identification, organizations can optimize synchronization and maintain consistency across their workflows. 

 Click here to watch the Enable Now video. 

 

SAP Signavio Journey Modeler 

Quick start journey modeling with best-practice journey models and journey model templates 

Creating seamless, impactful customer journeys can be a challenging task—but it doesn’t have to be. With the Value Accelerator Library for SAP Signavio, journey modelers now have access to best-practice journey models and templates that can be easily personalized to suit your unique needs. Designed to help you optimize customer experiences and accelerate the journey modeling process, this library provides the tools you need to fast-track model creation, ensuring that you can create meaningful, effective journeys in less time. 

Click here to watch the Enable Now video. 

 

Conclusion 

The latest updates in SAP Signavio Process Manager and Journey Modeler bring enhanced efficiency, greater control, and streamlined workflows to your decision modeling, process management, and journey optimization efforts. From the intuitive DMN TestLab UX to the seamless synchronization between SAP Signavio and SAP Cloud ALM, these advancements are designed to empower your teams with the tools they need for continuous improvement. Whether you’re simplifying report generation or fast-tracking journey modeling, these updates provide you with the agility and intelligence to drive your enterprise’s success. 

 

Stay tuned for more exciting updates and innovations from SAP Signavio.

entry.title: Hide/show totals of a SAC Story Table dimension dynamically
entry.content:
Hi, 

I would like to know if there is a way to hide/show totals of a Dimension on a SAC Story Tables dynamically via scripting. In our scenario, per default we show totals, users are able to add a dimension to table, and with the new added dimension totals doesn't make sense. 

Thanks 

Emil

Thank you Michael.
I hope SAP will add it to the roadmap as I cannot find it.

entry.title: Re: Downpayment for Poland
entry.content: Downpayment invoice is created with reference to sales order, therefore they are connected by definition.

entry.title: Re: Express document "Update was terminated" received fro...
entry.content: Check the note 2564358 - Dump DBSQL_DUPLICATE_KEY_ERROR while sending confirmations for Purchase Order containing VAS

entry.title: Re: Delegated User Administration Using Attribute-Based Access Control in SAP Cloud Identity Service
entry.content:
Hi @sridath ,

Unfortunately assigning a group to a policy is not possible. Creating a policy to match user.attributes = group name is also not possible. The supported user.attributes are only those that are listed here.

BR,

Valentin

entry.title: Re: Registration For SAP Sapphire Virtual In 2025 Is Now Live!
entry.content:
Hi all,

I have registered for this event. Looking forward to learn more from the two days event. 
Thanks for arranging such a event.

Best Regards
Arun

entry.title: Re: Library view - price and item description
entry.content: Hi, thank you very much! Unfortunately I can´t find the Label format.CatalogSearchResults.ApproximatePrice in our system anymore. Is there maybe another possibility? Best regards Anna

entry.title: RAP Custom action to Delete only to SET LOEKZ = 'X' - side effects not working
entry.content:
Hi Guys, on a managed scenario i need a custom action only to SET loekz =  'X' ( deleted field), and after i need some side effects. ( its a table iside a object page )

as i can see all custom actions perform a POST to execute and after GET, as im doing a 
update DB set loekz = 'X' on post

i have error on console on GET because that record also doesnt exists on my CDS View anymore, because of that Side effects are not working , i need to recalculate some fields after this 'custom delete'

do you guys have any idea how to solve it?

entry.title: Re: How to send mail to external email within workflow
entry.content:
Hi @everyone ,

I have done the required things,

created a workflow start with user decision.

where i have given user as my user name in se01 and tried creating new user with different mail id also.

assign that created two decision as approve reject and then add send mail mapping for respective users also.

but when i run the workflow no email is going in sost or to the user.

i have the required things in se01 where choose the method email , and done so16 config.

where choose

in SO16, tab Mail sy.grp, radio button "Send to Home Addresses of Users"

 in SO16, tab Addressing, Reset buffer.

but mail is not trigger ?

anyone can help ?

entry.title: Re: Monitor Bank Fees app Camt.086 AFP service Service Codes calculated volume field
entry.content: I am referring to all the bank statements that were imported in the period in which you are monitoring your bank fees. For camt.053, bank codes are within the <BkTxCd> tag and have values like "COMM" for Comissions etc.

entry.title: Re: SAP RAP Custom entity referential constraint error wi...
entry.content: Yes, you're right—the framework does get tangled with the names at runtime. Since SAP offers this option, I thought I might have missed something that was causing it not to work. In any case, I've removed the annotation for now to get things running. Thanks again for your response!

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Process Automation: Error importing project...
entry.content:
Hi @miltonc 

I don't know whether your reply was addressed to me... If so, where can I delete the dependencies? Because there's no trace of the project in the item list of the lobby. Plus, why are there 19 "residual" projects after upgrading to Build Apps standard version?

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/quot-import-failed-quot-error-can-t-import-project-from-build-apps-standard/qaq-p/14085630

entry.title: Re: XI: Restarting successfully processed messages
entry.content:
Thanks, this was helpfull!

 


Just one small addition; when execution is indeed on a test system you could also use the debugger and shift + F12 to skip the "check if support is requested" statement. This way, there is no need to create a Z* program.

entry.title: SAP Signavio April 2025 Release: SAP Signavio Process Insights and SAP Signavio Process Intelligence
entry.content:
The April 2025 release of the SAP Signavio Process Transformation suite is here—and it’s packed with powerful new capabilities designed to enhance process analysis and mining. Whether you're tackling daily operations or strategic initiatives, this update brings you tools to run your business more smoothly and efficiently. 

We’ve not only enhanced existing features but also introduced new ones, all with the goal of improving user experience, strengthening data security, aligning with organizational policies, and accelerating both the analysis of business challenges and your overall time-to-value. 

From smarter insights to faster workflows, the new features are built to support your success at every step. 

Keep reading to explore all the innovations included in the April 2025 SAP Signavio release for process analysis and mining! 

SAP Signavio Process Intelligence 

Mirror how your business actually works with the Relational process data model 

Imagine your business as a living system — intricate, interconnected, always in motion. Now, imagine having a modeling approach that mirrors that reality, instead of forcing it into rigid frameworks. 

With the latest SAP Signavio update, data modelers can now connect event logs directly with master data — think vendors, materials, or financial records — through intuitive, visual relationships. It’s like drawing lines between real-world touchpoints, creating a map that actually makes sense for how your business really runs. 

This shift does more than improve structure. It transforms how teams collaborate. Modelers can now define context visually, quickly bringing in new attributes without heavy lifting. Analysts, in turn, get faster access to richer, more relevant data — reduced waiting on lengthy updates or complicated workarounds. 

And behind the scenes? It’s just as intelligent. Instead of rebuilding the whole model with every change, only the updated parts are processed. That means faster pipelines, lower overhead, and scalable performance — ready to grow with your needs. 

In short: smarter modeling, smoother teamwork, and a system that adapts to your world — not the other way around. 

Relational Process Data Model

Click here to start a step-by-step tutorial for this feature.

Bring Workday into the Flow: Seamless Integration for Smarter Decisions 

Many organizations depend on Workday for critical HR and operational processes but bringing that data into process intelligence has long been a challenge — until now.  

With SAP Signavio’s new Workday integration, you can now leverage prebuilt connectors and curated content from SAP Cloud Integration to automatically feed Workday data into your analysis environment.  

Plug-and-play content from the SAP Business Accelerator Hub further accelerates time to value, making setup straightforward while expanding your ability to generate deeper, more actionable insights by combining Workday data with your existing process intelligence. 

Standard integration package for Workday using SAP Integration Suite

Control access right on the object level and ensure alignment with company policies  

With the latest enhancements in SAP Signavio, administrators now gain the power to manage user and group permissions at the object level — enabling tailored access that aligns with enterprise policies and your specific business needs.  

Bulk management streamlines administration, while a structured folder hierarchy enhances usability, making it easier for users to navigate and find what they need. And with plans to align the access rights experience across the SAP Signavio Process Transformation Suite, consistency is set to become a cornerstone of the user journey. 

New access rights on object level in Process Data Management

 Click here to start a step-by-step tutorial for this feature. 

Reduce training times and increase adoption with the improved filtering directly from widgets 

The upcoming improvement to SAP Signavio Process Intelligence makes filtering faster, easier, and more intuitive than ever. Building-on top of, and improving a pre-existent feature, now, with a simple right-click on any widget — like selecting a segment in a pie chart — users can instantly apply that selection as a filter across the entire dashboard, a specific page, or just the widget itself.  

This streamlined approach not only accelerates analysis but also reduces the learning curve, encouraging broader adoption across teams.  

Arriving by the end of H1 2025, it’s a small change with a big impact on how users interact with their data. 

Improved filtering- streamlined filtering of the UI directly from widgets

Improve security over data by limiting exporting permissions on CSV from Process 

In today’s data-driven world, visibility is key — but so is control. SAP Signavio now introduces a new layer of governance: process-level control over CSV data exports. With this capability, Process Managers can decide whether data can be exported from dashboards or investigations, placing that decision exactly where it belongs — at the process level. 

This enhancement empowers organizations to enforce tighter data policies and reduce the risk of unintended data exposure. Every widget across every dashboard and investigation within a process is covered, ensuring consistent application of export permissions. 

Through a simple toggle in the “Manage Access Rights” settings, CSV download rights can now be enabled or disabled per user group — offering a smarter, more secure way to manage who gets access to what. 

Disable Export to CSV from Process

 Disable Export to CSV from Process

Click here to start a step-by-step tutorial for this feature.

 

SAP Signavio Process Insights 

Business challenge analysis on a page: Analysis dashboards to support guided process improvement 

Even for process experts, knowing where to start to make process improvements can sometimes be a challenging task. The introduction of analysis dashboards to support guided process improvements significantly streamlines this task.   

Let’s suppose a process analyst has been tasked with looking more closely into the business challenge of reducing late supplier payments. In analysis dashboards the process analyst not only gets an overview of this specific business challenge: reducing late payments. At a glance they can see the number of invoices paid on time, late invoices, frequent problem areas.  

More than that, they can also move seamlessly from analysis to value realization by looking into the top improvement recommendations available, such as monitoring payment blocks and removing these when they are no longer needed.   

 Reducing late payments is just one typical business challenge. You can now select from several improvement opportunities to address your specific business challenges.  

Analysis Dashboards

 Click here to start a step-by-step tutorial for this feature.

Enhance transformation management: Integration of value analysis into SAP Signavio Process Transformation Manager 

Integration of the value analysis feature in SAP Signavio Process Insights into SAP Signavio Process Transformation Manager enables process owners and transformation leads to leverage detailed value analysis directly within their transformation projects. This update provides an easy way to assess the impact and value of process changes, helping to ensure that transformation initiatives are data-driven and aligned with business goals. 

Transformation teams can now gain a holistic view of transformation potential with centralized value insights, enhanced transparency and improved stakeholder buy-in. 

 Integration of value analysis into SAP Signavio Process Transformation Manager

Click here to start a step-by-step tutorial for this feature.

Build comprehensive business cases with persisting filters for value analysis

Value analysis of divisions (an update we released in the last quarter) enables process analysts and process owners to measure the impact of improvement activities for specific business units or divisions, rather than the whole organization. In this release we are pleased to build on this update by releasing persisting filters for value analysis.  

Let’s say you do a value analysis for a region like Australia. The filters used in this specific value calculation can be saved and applied to other relevant scenarios. By adding this saved base of different value calculations to SAP Signavio Process Transformation Manager, you can start to combine value analyses as part of building a comprehensive business case, saving time and increasing consistency in the process.  

Persisting filters for value analysis

 Click here to start a step-by-step tutorial for this feature. 

Filters for transformation planning 

We are also pleased to introduce filters for the transformation planning. This update is aimed at helping transformation leads and process owners plan the transformation journey for selected organizational units, such as specific plants. This feature allows you to specify a filter for one or more company codes and apply them to the list of available process flows. The resulting list shows available process flows for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition or SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition and supports faster and more efficient decision-making. 

Filters for transformation planning

Click here to start a step-by-step tutorial for this feature. 

 

We are looking forward to seeing you on the SAP Signavio Community to share feedback, questions and discuss with your peers! This is your space!

Please feel free to share your questions around the release or feedback in the comments with us. You can also reach out to us via the SAP Signavio Community or alternatively watch our Release Webcast on-demand.

entry.title: Re: Error when installing SAP developer trial system in L...
entry.content: See this update, it should help.

entry.title: Re: Ariba : Report containing PR and PO numbers
entry.content: Using analytical report desired output can be performed.

entry.title: Re: Issue with sap.ui.core.Component.create and sap.ui.fl...
entry.content: SAP has acknowledged it as a bug and resolved the issue in UI5 patch release 1.120.24.

entry.title: SAP standard authorization details for SAP Datasphere Business Content
entry.content:
Hello All,
I am going through help.sap.com/docs for SAP standard authorization details for SAP Datasphere Business Content and couldn't find any.
Can you please point to material where I can get these details.

Thanking in advance.

entry.title: Settlement document - multiple tax codes
entry.content:
Hi Guys, 

I need help with some standard logic. We have an italien rebate document (credit memo) which has 2 tax conditions included (via external tool determined) - this all works perfectly fine. We have two tax conditions which determines correct tax codes wihtin the condition. 

But on WBRP-MWSK2 only the last determined is saved and only one tax code is transferd to accounting which is wrong! I´m not 100% sure if this would work as per standard or if our consulting company has played around to much in transfer manager and messed things up. Any helpful input on how it should work as per standard or what to look out for in transfer manager?! Any help highly appriciated!

entry.title: Compensation Access for a New Manager
entry.content:
Hello Community !

I have a user who has recently been promoted to a managerial position after the completion of last year’s compensation cycle. I would like them to have access to view the forms from the completed compensation cycle, similar to other managers with that capability through Field-based Permissions. Although the user has already been updated to reflect their new manager role in Employee Central, they still lack the necessary access.



Thank you !

entry.title: Re: difference in Profit Period
entry.content:
Hello Rebecca,

For such issue i would suggest creating support case.

entry.title: SAP Sapphire Orlando 2025: An Architect’s guide: SAP Business Data Cloud and SAP Databricks - BDC263
entry.content:
Hi Everyone, My name is Gaurish Dessai and I’m a Principal Enterprise Architect at SAP. I am part of Global Enterprise Architecture Advisory team which works closely with our customers and on strategic projects. I am a hands-on Enterprise Architect, with over 13+ years of experience in Architecting and delivering programs from idea to adoption. I bring strong expertise in Supply chain, Sales, Digital, M&A, Divestiture, Sustainability & Manufacturing from both customer and consulting background.

My Session: An architect’s guide: SAP Business Data Cloud and SAP Databricks solutions - BDC2633. I am presenting together with Michelle Wiktorsson (Databricks) on 20th May 2025 at 1:00 PM - 1:40 PM EDT as part of the SAP Sapphire ASUG Pre-conference in Orlando.

I couldn’t be more excited about this! I started working in the SAP world as a junior SAP Sales & Distribution (SD) functional consultant in 2012. We were a bunch of fresh campus-hire graduates and received 2 months of intense SAP functional and technical training at the learning academy in Hyderabad.

As an junior SAP ‘resource’ working in support and projects from an offshore development center (ODC) for a very large client, attending SAP Sapphire was a distant dream! SAP Sapphire was when the whole ODC would be buzzing about latest launches by SAP for days and followed up by reading about them on SAP Community blog

Since then, 13 SAP Sapphire’s later, the moment came! I got confirmation of our session being selected for SAP Sapphire ASUG Pre-Conference at Orlando, I was over the moon.  It was actually my co-presenter, Michelle’s idea to propose a join session on the topic of SAP Business Data Cloud  and Databricks tailored for Architects – and I am glad that we followed through with that idea.

So, here we are, less than 20 days as I write this post and we submit the first draft of our session for review with the ASUG team! In our session, we would be talking about aspects of SAP Business Data Cloud and Databricks which are critical for every architect to know.

What will you learn from the session?

  1. Why SAP Business Data Cloud and Why Now?
  2. What does it mean for architects
  3. What are the capabilities of SAP Business Data and Databricks
  4. Transition paths to modernizing your Data landscape
  5. Architects role in making trusted data available to the business
  6. How Architects can derive value from SAP BDC and Databricks

So, If you’re an architect navigating the evolving data landscape—or just curious about how SAP BDC and Databricks, feel free to drop into our session. Michelle and I are bringing together practical insights, real-world patterns, and a good bit of our combined experience to make it worth your time. Hope to see you there and geek out over data and architecture with us!

Now let’s hear from you - please feel free to share your thoughts in the comments! 🚀 

Please answer these question/s by adding a comment in the comments section (e.g. 1-B,2-C):   

Question 1:   “Which capabilities of SAP Business Data Cloud would you like to understand in detail?”  

Multiple Choice:  

  1. A) Enterprise-wide data integration across SAP and non-SAP environments  
  2. B) Advanced data governance, compliance, and security management  
  3. C) Embedded AI, machine learning, and intelligent analytics capabilities  

Question 2:   “As you prepare your data landscape for AI, which areas are your highest priorities?”  

Multiple Choice:  

  1. A) Driving data quality, consistency, and accessibility at scale  
  2. B) Building a scalable, resilient infrastructure for AI and ML workloads  
  3. C) Strengthening data governance frameworks to enable responsible AI  

Related community tags (Subscribe to remain current): SAP Business Data Cloud 

Related community topic pages: SAP Business Data Cloud

entry.title: Re: Query regarding changing the default delimiter from c...
entry.content: @William_Yu

entry.title: Re: Query regarding changing the default delimiter from c...
entry.content: @William_Yu Thank you for the comment. But I'm getting a Failed to login application user. Could you help me here

entry.title: 🇳🇴 ‌SBN HR Day - Oslo
entry.content:
This event organized by the Norwegian SAP User Group (SBN) offers insights into various HR topics. It is valuable for professionals seeking to understand regional adaptations of SAP systems and enhance their HR processes.

Don't miss the session on the localization of SAP solutions in Norway: 14:50 pm - 15:10 pm!

Speaker:
Marit Andersen, Localization Product Manager, SAP, Norway.

For more information about the event and to register, check out the event's landing page.

entry.title: Re: How to know all the SAP Business Partner Transaction Code by Just Typing BUPT in SAP S/4 HANA?
entry.content:
HI? I've typed them all (that i know & found) : 61 tcodes

BP
BUSI
BUS1
BUS23
BUSG
BUS6
BUS7
BUPA_EVENTS
BUS8
BUS9
BUSB
BUSB_DI
BUSC
BUSJ
BUSO
BUSH
BUS_HDRID
BUSD
BUSE
BUSWU01
BUSWU02
BUSWU03
BUSWU11
BUSWU21
BUSWU31
AOBJ
BUPMASS
BUB1
BUB2
BUB3
BUB4
BUB5
BUB6
BUBX
BUBD
BUBM
BUBH
BUBI
BUBJ
BUBK
BUBL_DI
BUBL
BUBO
BUBY
BUBZ
BUBA
BUBB
BUSWU41
BUSM
BUSN
BUS0
CVI_COCKPIT
MDS_LOAD_COCKPIT
MDS_PPO2
CVI_PRECHK
XDN1
BUCF
BP_CVI_IMG_CHK
MDS_LINKS
SE18
CVI_COMPL_CHK

br,
